title: Configurator platform preset
description: Shape for a platform file under public/platforms/. Every field is validated by the test suite so a malformed contribution fails CI before merge.

id.description: Lowercase identifier; must match the filename minus .json extension.

label.description: Display text in the platform dropdown and inline warnings.

roon.description: Default host path for the /Roon container mount.

music.description: Default host path for the /Music container mount.

backup.description: Default host path for the /RoonBackups container mount.

prefix.description: Placeholder prefix for the add-mount input. Empty string allowed for platforms with no standard root.

hint.description: One-sentence help text shown under the platform dropdown.

rootPattern.description: Optional. JavaScript regex string; host paths that don't match trigger a soft warning.

hidden.description: Optional. true keeps the platform loaded but omits it from the dropdown.

userOverride.description: Optional. UID or UID:GID string (e.g. "0:0") forced on the emitted container output when this platform is selected. Use for platforms that default to a non-root UID when Roon's image needs root (TrueNAS Apps defaults to UID 568).
